options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: difficulty
options.description: Changes relative spell cost and stuff

options.name: energy_core
options.description: How to obtain the Energy Core

options.name: required_fragments
options.description: Required fragment count for Energy Core = Fragments

options.name: available_fragments
options.description: Placed fragment count for Energy Core = Fragments

options.name: money_modifier
options.description: Money multiplier in %

options.name: exp_modifier
options.description: EXP multiplier for Weapons, Characters and Spells in %

options.name: sequence_breaks
options.description: Disable, enable some sequence breaks or put them in logic

options.name: out_of_bounds
options.description: Disable, enable the out-of-bounds glitch or put it in logic

options.name: fix_cheats
options.description: Fix cheats left in by the devs (not desert skip)

options.name: fix_infinite_ammo
options.description: Fix infinite ammo glitch

options.name: fix_atlas_glitch
options.description: Fix atlas underflowing stats

options.name: fix_wings_glitch
options.description: Fix wings making you invincible in some areas

options.name: shorter_dialogs
options.description: Cuts some dialogs

options.name: short_boss_rush
options.description: Start boss rush at Metal Magmar, cut enemy HP in half

options.name: ingredienizer
options.description: On Shuffles, Full randomizes spell ingredients

options.name: sniffamizer
options.description:
Off: all vanilla items in sniff spots
Shuffle: sniff items shuffled into random sniff spots
    Everywhere: add sniff spots to multiworld pool

options.name: sniff_ingredients
options.description: Select which items should be used as sniff items

options.name: callbeadamizer
options.description: On Shuffles call bead characters, Full shuffles individual spells

options.name: musicmizer
options.description: Randomize music for some rooms

options.name: doggomizer
options.description: On shuffles dog per act, Full randomizes dog per screen, Pupdunk gives you Everpupper everywhere

options.name: turdo_mode
options.description: Replace offensive spells by Turd Balls with varying strength and make weapons weak

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: trap_count
options.description: Replace some filler items with traps

options.name: trap_chance_quake
options.description: Sets the chance/ratio of quake traps

options.name: trap_chance_poison
options.description: Sets the chance/ratio of poison effect traps

options.name: trap_chance_confound
options.description: Sets the chance/ratio of confound effect traps

options.name: trap_chance_hud
options.description: Sets the chance/ratio of HUD visibility traps

options.name: trap_chance_ohko
options.description: Sets the chance/ratio of OHKO (1HP left) traps

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
